title.en: Tuchel vows to remain as England head coach after Argentina defeat
title.zh-CN: 图切尔发誓在阿根廷战败后继续担任英格兰主教练

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel says he will stay on to lead England into Euro 2028 despite their World Cup semi-final defeat to Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，他将继续带领英格兰队进入2028年欧洲杯，尽管他们的世界杯半决赛输给了阿根廷队。

title.en: World Cup 2026 schedule: England to face France in third-place play-off
title.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯赛程：英格兰队将在第三名附加赛中对阵法国队

summary.en: There are now just two games left in the 2026 World Cup, with England facing a third-place play-off.
summary.zh-CN: 现在2026年世界杯只剩下两场比赛，英格兰队面临第三名附加赛。

title.en: 'That's why he's the king' - Messi sets up third World Cup final
title.zh-CN: “这就是为什么他是国王” -梅西组建了第三届世界杯决赛

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at Lionel Messi's masterclass on the right wing to knock England out of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育频道（ BBC Sport ）看着莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）的右翼大师班，将英格兰队赶出世界杯

title.en: 'The change didn't work' - England player ratings
title.zh-CN: “变化不起作用” -英格兰球员评级

summary.en: BBC Sport's England reporter Alex Howell rates the players after the Three Lions lost to Argentina in the World Cup semi-final.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台的英格兰记者亚历克斯·豪威尔（ Alex Howell ）在世界杯半决赛中输给阿根廷的三只狮子队后，对球员进行

title.en: 'No regrets' - Tuchel on England's defeat by Argentina
title.zh-CN: “不后悔” --图切尔谈英格兰战胜阿根廷

summary.en: England manager Thomas Tuchel believes his team "got too passive" after scoring first in the World Cup semi-final against Argentina, which they lost 2-1 at Atlanta Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）认为，他的球队在对阵阿根廷的世界杯半决赛中首次得分后“过于被动” ，他们在亚特兰大体育场以2比1输掉了比赛。

title.en: 'He was my biggest fan' - BBC pundit Richards' father dies
title.zh-CN: “他是我最大的粉丝” -英国广播公司专家理查兹的父亲去世

summary.en: Micah Richards pays tribute to his father Lincoln, who died shortly before the BBC pundit went on air for England's World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 米卡·理查兹（ Micah Richards ）向他的父亲林肯（ Lincoln ）致敬，林肯在英国广播公司（ BBC ）专家因英格兰世界杯半决赛被阿根廷击败而播出前不久去世。

title.en: Late Martinez header sends Argentina to World Cup final
title.zh-CN: 后期马丁内斯头球将阿根廷队送入世界杯决赛

summary.en: Substitute Lautaro Martinez is in the right place at the right time to head home Lionel Messi's 92nd-minute cross to send Argentina to the World Cup final at the expense of England.
summary.zh-CN: 替补球员劳塔罗·马丁内斯（ Lautaro Martinez ）在正确的时间来到了正确的地点，以英格兰为代价，在莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）第92分钟的比赛中将阿根廷送回了世界杯决赛

title.en: Fernandez fires in equaliser for Argentina
title.zh-CN: 费尔南德斯为阿根廷发射均衡器

summary.en: Enzo Fernandez equalises for Argentina against England in the 2026 World Cup semi final at the Atlanta Stadium.
summary.zh-CN: 在亚特兰大体育场举行的2026年世界杯半决赛中，恩佐·费尔南德斯代表阿根廷对阵英格兰。

title.en: Final two World Cup matches to be shown live on BBC
title.zh-CN: 最后两场世界杯比赛将在英国广播公司直播

summary.en: Saturday's World Cup third-place play-off between England and France and Sunday's World Cup final will both be  live on BBC TV.
summary.zh-CN: 周六的世界杯英格兰和法国之间的第三场附加赛和周日的世界杯决赛都将在BBC电视上直播。

title.en: Man Utd target Summerville - Thursday's gossip
title.zh-CN: 曼联目标萨默维尔-周四的八卦

summary.zh-CN: 西汉姆联队边锋Crysencio Summerville是曼联的目标，阿森纳正在为挪威边锋Antonio Nusa准备报价，埃弗顿考虑转会曼城的Rico Lewis ，加上...

title.en: Sunderland sign Belgium World Cup defender Meunier
title.zh-CN: 桑德兰签约比利时世界杯后卫穆尼耶

summary.en: Experienced Belgian defender Thomas Meunier signs for Sunderland after his contract with Lille comes to an end.
summary.zh-CN: 经验丰富的比利时后卫托马斯·穆尼尔（ Thomas Meunier ）在与里尔的合同结束后签约桑德兰。

title.en: Coventry close on £17m Switzerland defender Amenda
title.zh-CN: 考文垂接近£ 1700万瑞士后卫阿门达

summary.en: Coventry City close in on a deal worth more than £17m for Eintracht Frankfurt defender Aurele Amenda.
summary.zh-CN: 考文垂市与Eintracht法兰克福后卫Aurele Amenda达成了一项价值超过1700万英镑的交易。

title.en: Promoted Crystal Palace sign striker England
title.zh-CN: 晋升水晶宫标志前锋英格兰

summary.en: Newly promoted Women's Super League club Crystal Palace sign striker Bethany England on free transfer.
summary.zh-CN: 新晋升的女子超级联赛俱乐部水晶宫标志前锋伯大尼英格兰免费转会。

title.en: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
title.zh-CN: 到目前为止，英格兰2026年世界杯的所有进球

summary.en: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.
summary.zh-CN: 随着英格兰队准备在迈阿密体育场迎战挪威队，参加世界杯四分之一决赛，重温托马斯·图切尔在那里的所有进球。

title.en: All of Argentina's goals from the World Cup so far
title.zh-CN: 到目前为止，阿根廷在世界杯上的所有进球

summary.en: Watch all 17 of Argentina's goals from World Cup 2026 on their way to the semi-final, where they face England.
summary.zh-CN: 观看阿根廷从2026年世界杯到半决赛的所有17个进球，在那里他们面对英格兰。
